name: Xura, Inc.
description: Xura, Inc., formerly known as Comverse, Inc., was a technology company headquartered in Wakefield, Massachusetts, that provided a portfolio of digital services and cloud-based solutions to communication service providers and enterprises. The company enabled global communications across various mobile devices and platforms, helping clients navigate and monetize the digital ecosystem. Xura operated until 2017, when it was taken private and subsequently rebranded as Mavenir Systems following the acquisition of Mitel Mobile. Its solutions were utilized by hundreds of service providers and enterprises in over 100 countries worldwide.
